summary: Completed testing of MatchMe app with connected real services (Cloudinary, Stripe, Resend) and updated credit system (2 reviews = 1 credit). Backend APIs working correctly, but frontend authentication flow has issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submits successfully but doesn't redirect to dashboard

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login doesn't complete authentication flow - users remain on auth page after successful form submission

passed_tests: User registration creates account with 3 credits
Dashboard API returns correct credit system (2 ratings = 1 credit)
Pricing page shows updated credit system (Rate 2 photos = 1 credit)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow - login form submits but doesn't redirect users to dashboard. Backend authentication is working correctly, issue is in frontend auth integration/redirect logic.
